title: Add guarded Finance workspace for personal records, tax tracking, and trading plans
description: Create a Finance screen plus authenticated API and local secure store for income, expenses, accounts, savings goals, tax records, market/risk data, and blocked-by-default trading plans for Binance/IBKR workflows.

title: Add finance record entry forms
description: Layer guided web forms on top of the Finance API for accounts, income, expenses, savings goals, tax records, and trading-plan drafts with client-side validation.

title: Wire read-only market connectors behind finance guardrails
description: Add read-only Binance and IBKR/paper endpoints that fetch market data without storing API secrets in the JSON store and without enabling order execution.

title: Add finance import/export tools
description: Provide CSV/JSON import and export utilities for finance records, tax summaries, and audit trails with explicit masking of sensitive identifiers.

title: Add guided Finance record entry forms
description: Build accessible forms on /finance for accounts, income, expenses, savings goals, tax records, and trading-plan drafts so users do not need to POST raw JSON.

title: Add read-only market data connector smoke tests
description: Introduce mocked Binance and IBKR/paper connector tests that verify no secret values are persisted and no order execution endpoint exists in observe-only mode.

title: Fix Vitest unit-test include/exclude baseline
description: Adjust unit-test configuration so Playwright E2E specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs tests are excluded from pnpm test, leaving those suites to their dedicated runners.
